name: diagnostic-driven-debugging
description: 6-phase structured debugging skill for opencode (Phase 0 RECALL + 5 investigation/fix phases): RECALL → REPRODUCE → EVIDENCE → HYPOTHESIS → FIX → POSTMORTEM. MCP-aware routing, memory-backed via omo-session-distiller. Ported from obra/superpowers and extended.
extensions: MCP routing table for Phase 2 EVIDENCE (new)
